dialogueChunks.intro: Look around you, {player_name}. Everything you see? We built this.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus} is producing at full capacity. Three settlements have placed orders. {target_npc} came by this morning: not to threaten, but to negotiate. They finally see that fighting me is more expensive than working with me. {quest_stakes} was won, and the {quest_item} you gathered made it possible.
dialogueChunks.outro: You backed the right horse, {player_name}. Here's your share. And there'll be more where that came from.

playerResponses.text: A good outcome for everyone. I'll take my share gladly.
Just remember who made this possible when you're counting your profits.
Profit and peace. Not bad for a day's work.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}. I owe you an honest word, and I always pay my debts.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I got what I wanted. The trade routes, the contracts, the influence. But it cost more than I planned. {target_npc} won't speak to me, and half the settlement looks at me differently. {quest_stakes} was won, but {quest_action} left scars I didn't expect. {location} is stronger now. But some mornings I wonder if the old way was really so bad.
dialogueChunks.outro: Here. Your payment, as promised. You might be the only person left who doesn't resent me for what we did.

playerResponses.text: Power always comes with a price. You knew that going in.
Maybe rebuild some bridges while you still can.

dialogueChunks.intro: Well, {player_name}. We did it. The question is: was it worth it?
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement is thriving. New trade, new wealth, new construction. {target_npc} even admitted the old way wasn't working. But I notice people step aside when I walk past: not out of respect, but caution. {quest_action} bought me everything I asked for and something I didn't: a very particular kind of loneliness.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take your reward, {player_name}. You were the best partner a schemer could ask for. {quest_stakes} is settled, for better or worse.

playerResponses.text: Loneliness is the toll of ambition. Spend your gains wisely.
You got what you wanted. Most people never even get that.
Maybe use some of that wealth to earn back what you lost.
